segments.text: Say ye unto your brethren, Ammi; and to your sisters, Ru-hamah.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: Ru-hamah: that is, Having obtained mercy

segments.text: Plead with your mother, plead: for she is not my wife, neither am I her husband: let her therefore put away her whoredoms out of her sight, and her adulteries from between her breasts;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Lest I strip her naked, and set her as in the day that she was born, and make her as a wilderness, and set her like a dry land, and slay her with thirst.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And I will not have mercy upon her children; for they be the children of whoredoms.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For their mother hath played the harlot:
I will go after my lovers, that give me my bread and my water, my wool and my flax, mine oil and my drink.
segments.speaker: Israel (metaphorical wife)

segments.text: Therefore, behold, I will hedge up thy way with thorns, and make a wall, that she shall not find her paths.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: make a wall: Heb. wall a wall
heading: God's Judgment and Restoration

segments.text: I will go and return to my first husband; for then was it better with me than now.
segments.speaker: Israel (metaphorical wife)

segments.text: For she did not know that I gave her corn, and wine, and oil, and multiplied her silver and gold, which they prepared for Baal.

footnotes: which they prepared for Baal: or, wherewith they made Baal

segments.text: Therefore will I return, and take away my corn in the time thereof, and my wine in the season thereof, and will recover my wool and my flax given to cover her nakedness.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And now will I discover her lewdness in the sight of her lovers, and none shall deliver her out of mine hand.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will also cause all her mirth to cease, her feast days, her new moons, and her sabbaths, and all her solemn feasts.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And I will destroy her vines and her fig trees, whereof she hath said, These are my rewards that my lovers have given me: and I will make them a forest, and the beasts of the field shall eat them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And I will visit upon her the days of Baalim, wherein she burned incense to them, and she decked herself with her earrings and her jewels, and she went after her lovers, and forgat me, saith the LORD.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Therefore, behold, I will allure her, and bring her into the wilderness, and speak comfortably unto her.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: comfortably: or, friendly: Heb. to her heart
heading: Promise of Restoration

segments.text: And I will give her her vineyards from thence, and the valley of Achor for a door of hope: and she shall sing there, as in the days of her youth, and as in the day when she came up out of the land of Egypt.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And it shall be at that day, saith the LORD, that thou shalt call me Ishi; and shalt call me no more Baali.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For I will take away the names of Baalim out of her mouth, and they shall no more be remembered by their name.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And in that day will I make a covenant for them with the beasts of the field, and with the fowls of heaven, and with the creeping things of the ground: and I will break the bow and the sword and the battle out of the earth, and will make them to lie down safely.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And I will betroth thee unto me for ever; yea, I will betroth thee unto me in righteousness, and in judgment, and in lovingkindness, and in mercies.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will even betroth thee unto me in faithfulness: and thou shalt know the LORD.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And it shall come to pass in that day, I will hear, saith the LORD, I will hear the heavens, and they shall hear the earth;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the earth shall hear the corn, and the wine, and the oil; and they shall hear Jezreel.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And I will sow her unto me in the earth; and I will have mercy upon her that had not obtained mercy; and I will say to them which were not my people, Thou art my people; and they shall say, Thou art my God.
segments.speaker: God
